_description: Transcription corrections applied on top of normalized cards. Fixes upstream API scraping errors so our cards/STxx/*.json files reflect the text actually printed on Bandai cards. Not to be confused with ruleset errata (see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) — those live in rulesets/ and are versioned per ruleset.

_schema.keys_starting_with_underscore: Stripped before merging. Use for meta like _reason, _source.

object_form.before_contains: substring expected in the current field value

override_shape.direct_form: any JSON value — replaces the field unconditionally (use sparingly; before_contains is safer)

behaviors.applied: current value matches before_contains -> replaced with after
behaviors.skipped-upstream-fixed: current value already equals after -> correction is obsolete, consider removing
behaviors.stale: neither matches -> emit warning; correction may need updating for a new upstream shape

effect_text.before_contains: cost of 4 or less than [Gecko Moria]
effect_text.after: [On Play] Add up to 1 "The Seven Warlords of the Sea" or "Thriller Bark Pirates" type Character with a cost of 4 or less other than [Gecko Moria] from your trash to your hand.

ST03-004._reason: Upstream optcgapi.com scraper dropped 'other' — produces ungrammatical 'cost of 4 or less than [Gecko Moria]'.
